footerColophon: Sunnah Remedies · Institute of Prophetic Medicine
arrivalEnglish: The medicine of the prophetic tradition, kept living
standfirst: An institution for the preservation and responsible transmission of prophetic medicine — grounded in primary-source scholarship, laboratory verification, clinical accountability, and plain limits
traditionStandfirst: What is this discipline, and why does it require an institution?
traditionBody0: Prophetic Medicine is not folk remedy, not alternative wellness, not a brand opportunity. It is a received body of knowledge — transmitted through authenticated chains, tested against observable evidence, and constrained by the limits its own sources declare
traditionBody1: This institution exists because the discipline deserves the same rigour as any established medical tradition: verifiable scholarship, clinical governance, transparent provenance, and patient dignity at every encounter
pullQuoteText: Healing is from Allah; the remedy is a means
thresholdPurpose: The threshold — crossing into the institution
thresholdComposition: Wide establishing shot, strong architecture, human presence suggested not centred
thresholdAlt: Scholarly hands examining an illuminated manuscript of Prophetic medicine beside glass vessels of amber oil and black seed
correspondenceBody: Occasional correspondence on scholarship, new monographs, and programme announcements. No frequency promise; no promotional content
correspondenceConsent: You will receive institutional correspondence by email. Unsubscribe at any time by replying or using the link provided
institutionStatement: Knowledge before commerce. Service before profit. Trust before growth. The institution exists for the next generation
deptKnowledgeStandfirst: The open shelf — monographs, research notes, and patient guides, all graded and cited
deptKnowledgePlateAlt: A scholarly reading room with open manuscripts and natural light
deptAcademyStandfirst: Clinical education in Hijama and Prophetic therapeutics, structured by isnād
deptAcademyPlatePurpose: Tutorial room with faculty and students
deptAcademyPlateAlt: Students in a scholarly classroom studying anatomical charts and medical texts under natural light
deptApothecaryStandfirst: A cabinet of preparations, each documented to source before dispensation
deptApothecaryPlateAlt: An apothecary dispensary with amber glass vessels of honey and oils arranged on aged wooden shelving
deptJourneysStandfirst: Educational pilgrimage to the Holy Lands — preparation precedes departure, purpose before itinerary. Every journey carries a reading list, a faculty companion, and a clear statement of difficulty
deptJourneysPlatePurpose: Masjid an-Nabawi at golden hour — quiet courtyard and green dome
deptJourneysPlateAlt: Masjid an-Nabawi at golden hour — warm marble courtyard, green dome, and distant pilgrims in quiet reflection
jsonLdDescription: An institute of Prophetic Medicine for scholarship, clinical care, and natural therapeutics
